title: Claude OS lightweight skill regression test case
description: Declares a scenario and expected contracts checked against skills-manifest.json and capability-manifest.json (no LLM).

routeId.description: Must match a capability-manifest.json routes[].id; route must list skillId in relevantSkills

inputSummary.description: Human-readable intent of the simulated task (not executed)

expectedRequiredApprovals.description: Each entry must match route.requiredApproval (case-insensitive) or appear in the skill's requiresApprovalFor (case-insensitive)

expectedValidators.description: Each substring must appear in at least one route.validators line (case-insensitive)

forbiddenActions.description: Each substring must appear in at least one route.forbiddenShortcuts line (case-insensitive)

expectedRefusalOrAbortConditions.description: Each substring must appear in route.forbiddenShortcuts or route.expectedEvidence (case-insensitive)

expectedSkillRiskLevel.description: When set, must equal skills-manifest entry riskLevel

expectedRouteRiskLevel.description: When set, must equal route riskLevel
